mapper.sql: h.ID, h.STOCK_CODE, s.STOCK_NAME, s.TYPE_NAME, h.TRANS_DATE, h.BEFORE_DAY_PRICE, h.OPEN_PRICE, h.HIGH_PRICE, h.LOW_PRICE, h.CLOSE_PRICE, h.ADJUSTED_CLOSE_PRICE, h.BEFORE_DAY_DIFF, h.BEFORE_DAY_DIFF_PERCENT, h.VOLUME, h.REMARK
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM M_STOCK_PRICE_HISTORY h LEFT JOIN M_STOCK s ON h.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE
ORDER BY
h.ID h.STOCK_CODE h.TRANS_DATE
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM M_STOCK_PRICE_HISTORY h LEFT JOIN M_STOCK s ON h.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE WHERE h.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STOCK_PRICE_HISTORY ( STOCK_CODE, TRANS_DATE, BEFORE_DAY_PRICE, OPEN_PRICE, HIGH_PRICE, LOW_PRICE, CLOSE_PRICE, ADJUSTED_CLOSE_PRICE, BEFORE_DAY_DIFF, BEFORE_DAY_DIFF_PERCENT, VOLUME, REMARK ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{transDate}, #{beforeDayPrice}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{adjustedClosePrice}, #{beforeDayDiff}, #{beforeDayDiffPercent}, #{volume}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_STOCK_PRICE_HISTORY SET STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}, TRANS_DATE = #{transDate}, BEFORE_DAY_PRICE = #{beforeDayPrice}, OPEN_PRICE = #{openPrice}, HIGH_PRICE = #{highPrice}, LOW_PRICE = #{lowPrice}, CLOSE_PRICE = #{closePrice}, ADJUSTED_CLOSE_PRICE = #{adjustedClosePrice}, BEFORE_DAY_DIFF = #{beforeDayDiff}, BEFORE_DAY_DIFF_PERCENT = #{beforeDayDiffPercent}, VOLUME = #{volume}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE ID = #{id}
